title: Pi Day WCS Dance
description: A beginner lesson targeted toward folks with little to no dance experience.
A social dance with music targeted toward folks who completed the beginner lesson. The music will feature queer artists and/or queer themes.

title: Earth Day Queer WCS Dance
description: A beginner lesson targeted toward folks with little to no dance experience.
A social dance with music targeted toward folks who completed the beginner lesson. The music will feature queer artists and/or queer themes.

title: May Queer WCS Social Dance
description: A beginner lesson targeted toward folks with little to no dance experience.
A social dance with music targeted toward folks who completed the beginner lesson. The music will feature queer artists and/or queer themes.
The theme is Hot Summer Gays!

title: The Big June Event
description: A workshop day with two tracks:
A) Beginner Track - Sugar Push, Passes, Whips, Starter Step
B) Party Track - Steals, Switches, Daisy Chains

A "Queer Prom" social dance in the evening with music targeted toward folks who completed the Beginner Track. The music will feature queer artists and/or queer themes, and include some music that you can slow dance to.
